title: Redmi A7 Pro 5G with 120Hz display and 6300 mAh battery launched in India, price starts at ₹12,499
summary: Xiaomi launched the REDMI A7 Pro 5G in India, priced from ₹12,499. The smartphone features a 6.9-inch display, 6300mAh battery, and octa-core processor. It offers introductory discounts and will be available from April 15 in three colors.

title: Infinix Note 60 Pro with Active Matrix Display and 6,500mAh battery launched in India, price starts at ₹31,999
summary: Infinix launched the Note 60 Pro in India, featuring Android 16, a 6500mAh battery, and Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 processor. It has a 6.78-inch AMOLED display, dual cameras, and fast charging support. The phone starts at a price of ₹31,999 in India.

title: Hackers breach GTA 6 developer Rockstar Games, demand ransom payment by tomorrow
summary: Rockstar Games confirmed a data breach linked to a third-party provider. The ransomware group ShinyHunter has demanded a ransom by April 14 and have threatened to leak stolen data otherwise.&nbsp;

title: What is Project Houdini? How Amazon plans to build data centres faster by cutting thousands of labour hours
summary: Amazon is developing Project Houdini to speed up data centre construction for AI, according to a new report. The initiative is said to shift much of the process off-site, reducing construction time from 15 weeks to as little as two to three weeks and cutting labour hours significantly.

title: India has strong pipeline of ideas, keen to back local founders: Y Combinator’s Ankit Gupta
